redshift.endpointauthorization.CfnAbout: Describes an endpoint authorization for authorizing Redshift-managed VPC endpoint access to a cluster across AWS accounts.

redshift.endpointauthorization.Account.Description: The AAWS account ID of either the cluster owner (grantor) or grantee. If `Grantee` parameter is true, then the `Account` value is of the grantor.

redshift.endpointauthorization.Force.Description: Indicates whether to force the revoke action. If true, the Redshift-managed VPC endpoints associated with the endpoint authorization are also deleted.

redshift.endpointauthorization.VpcIds.Description: The virtual private cloud (VPC) identifiers to grant access to.
